name: OnTcpListen
title: OnTcpListen
syntax: void OnTcpListen( dword socket, long result)
description: If the CAPL program implements this callback it is called when TcpListen was called and a connection request for the specified socket is received.

The connection must be accepted with TcpAccept because the listen socket otherwise remains blocked for other clients. This block is evident for a client in OnTcpConnect from the output of error code 10061 (Connection refused).
